title: Pixel Perfection x CONTROLIFY
description: A compatibility pack between Controlify and Pixel Perfection Legacy.
body:
This is a **compatibility** pack between [Controlify](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlify) and **Pixel Perfection**. This pack is compatible with both [Pixel Perfection Legacy](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-legacy) and [Pixel Perfection Fidelity](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-fidelity/versions) texture packs. Try my new Texture pack **Pixel Perfection Fidelity**

# Some of the textures depicted belong to my other pack [PPL Alternative GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-alternative-gui). For a better experience, it's recommended to use it with this pack. # DEPENDENCIES - [Pixel Perfection Legacy](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-legacy) (REQUIRED) - [Controlify](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlify) (REQUIRED) # **MY OTHER PACKS** - [Pixel Perfection Fidelity](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-fidelity) - [Pixel Perfection x FARMER'S DELIGHT](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixelperfectionxfarmersdelight) - [Pixel Perfection x DEHYDRATION](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-x-dehydration) - [PPL Custom Theme for Jade](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-custom-theme-for-jade) - [PPL Alternative GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-alternative-gui) - [PPL Compat Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-compatibility-pack) - [PPL Hodgepodge](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-hodgepodge) - [PPL Better Grass](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-better-grass)
